items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for selector types, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding selector types such as specific records, credential types, or fact requirements. Without this critical information, it is impossible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or not, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps do not address the necessary elements to validate this requirement, indicating a gap in the evidence provided.
